message:
test(ft-xbnl0.2.4): broadcast_recv_with_cx observes pre-cancel (tick 420)

Pins cx-cancel observation on `broadcast_recv_with_cx`. With live
senders (no disconnect), no published messages, and a pre-cancelled
cx, the receive must return Err promptly rather than blocking
indefinitely waiting for a publish that is not coming.

Test shape (matches the tick-419 oneshot pattern):
- Create `(tx, _rx_keepalive)` broadcast channel (capacity 4)
- Subscribe a second receiver `rx` to test cancel-on
- Keep `_tx` + `_rx_keepalive` alive (no Err(Closed))
- Pre-cancel cx via `cx.cancel_with(User, ...)`
- Wrap recv in 2 s outer safety-net timeout (via separate live cx)
  so a non-observing primitive blocks until the outer fires (loud)
- Assert elapsed < 1 s AND Err returned

Observed locally: test returns in under 20 ms — asupersync broadcast
receiver honours cx-cancel directly, same as oneshot.

Completes the core channel-primitive cancel matrix:

| Primitive                | Budget deadline | Direct cancel    |
|--------------------------|-----------------|------------------|
| sleep_with_cx            | ✓ tick 382      | ✗ documented     |
| timeout_with_cx          | ✓ tick 383      | ✗ documented     |
| yield_now_with_cx        | (n/a)           | ✓ tick 418       |
| oneshot_recv_with_cx     | (transitive)    | ✓ tick 419       |
| broadcast_recv_with_cx   | (transitive)    | ✓ tick 420       |

Broadcast receivers are used throughout the event fanout path
(`crates/frankenterm-core/src/events.rs`) — pinning cx-cancel here
guards against regressions in async fanout plumbing.

Check script Run 6/6 filter extended to include `broadcast_recv_with_cx`.
Test counts:

  1/6 HTTP client       : 34
  2/6 TLS               : 45
  3/6 Regression guards :  3
  4/6 Metrics server    :  3
  5/6 Web server        :  2
  6/6 runtime_compat    :  6  (+1 from tick 420)
  total                 : 93

Full check script passes locally via fork bypass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,11 +15,12 @@
 #   4. Metrics server cx-first family (3) — metrics_server_start_with_cx_*
 #      Pre-cancel / mid-flight-cancel / happy path.
 #   5. Web server cx pre-cancel (1) — web_server_with_cx_*
-#   6. runtime_compat primitive contracts (5) — _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline
-#      + yield_now_with_cx + oneshot_recv_with_cx
+#   6. runtime_compat primitive contracts (6) — _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline
+#      + yield_now_with_cx + oneshot_recv_with_cx + broadcast_recv_with_cx
 #      sleep_with_cx + timeout_with_cx budget-observation tests (ticks
 #      382/383), yield_now_with_cx cancel-checkpoint + happy-path tests
-#      (tick 418), oneshot_recv_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 419).
+#      (tick 418), oneshot_recv_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 419),
+#      broadcast_recv_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 420).
 #
 # Exit code 0 on all passing; non-zero on any failure.
 #
@@ -123,7 +124,7 @@ run_test "Run 6/6: runtime_compat primitive contracts (budget + cancel observati
     -p frankenterm-core \
     --features asupersync-runtime \
     --lib \
-    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx
+    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx broadcast_recv_with_cx
 
 echo
 echo "=============================================================="
